description: Tests that r-freestiler skill reads references and applies parameter intelligence

evals.name: county-zoom-intelligence
evals.prompt: I have county-level population data in an sf object called `counties` with 3,222 features. Create a PMTiles tileset for visualization with mapgl. The output should be called 'counties_pop.pmtiles' with layer name 'counties'.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads references/zoom-strategy.md and uses max_zoom = 10 for county data (not default 0-14)

assertions.description: max_zoom value is appropriate for counties (8-11, not 14)
Does NOT use bloated default zoom levels

assertions.check: Output mentions zoom guidance for county data OR cites zoom-strategy.md OR explains why max_zoom = 10 is appropriate

evals.name: mandatory-context-compliance
evals.prompt: Create vector tiles from this buildings dataset using freestiler. The data has 50,000 building footprints.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads MANDATORY-CONTEXT block references before writing code

assertions.description: Uses appropriate zoom for small features (buildings)
assertions.check: max_zoom value between 12-16 (appropriate for building-level detail)

assertions.description: Shows evidence of reading references before coding
assertions.check: Agent mentions reading references OR cites specific guidance from zoom-strategy.md for building-level features
